div1.entryFree:
Helpless, 1) receiving no aid, wanting support: hopeless and h. doth Aegeon wend, Err. I, 1, 158.
2) irremediable, incurable: what h. shame I feel, Lucr. 756.
3) affording no help, unprofitable, unavailing: as those poor birds that h. berries saw, Ven. 604 (viz painted grapes). this h. smoke of words, Lucr. 1027. poor h. help, Lucr. 1027 urging h. patience, Err. II, 1, 39. the h. balm of my poor eyes, R3 I, 2, 13.
